ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airbnb_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "price_original" REAL /* Original price of the listing */,
  "price_cal" REAL /* Calculated price of the listing */,
  "total_original" REAL /* Total original price of the listing */,
  "total_cal" REAL /* Total calculated price of the listing */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the listing location */,
  "yearmonth" INTEGER /* Year and month of the listing */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the listing */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the listing */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the property_types table */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON object containing a list of amenities */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available for rental */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Average review score of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airbnb_listings_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airbnb_listings_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("postcode") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the property location */,
  "yearmonth" INTEGER /* Year and month of the sale */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the property_types table */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the sale */,
  "sale_source" TEXT /* Source of the sale data (e.g., real estate agent, public records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("postcode") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_sales_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postcodes" (
  "postcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postcode */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region corresponding to the postcode */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the postcode area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the postcode area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the postcode area */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the postcode area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Property type (e.g., apartment, house) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_square_footage" REAL /* Average square footage for properties of this type */,
  "average_price_per_sqft" REAL /* Average price per square foot for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental yield entry */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the rental yield */,
  "yearmonth" INTEGER /* Year and month of the rental yield */,
  "rental_yield" REAL /* Rental yield value */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the property_types table */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rental price for the period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rental yield data (e.g., market research, public records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_yields_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_yields_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("postcode") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the market trend */,
  "yearmonth" INTEGER /* Year and month of the market trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Market trend value */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the property_types table */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., price, volume, demand) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market trend data (e.g., market research, public records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_postcode FOREIGN KEY ("postcode") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode")
)
